allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Fix CORS issue: Add withCredentials to axios config

The axios instance was missing withCredentials: true, which is required
when the backend has allow_credentials=True in CORS configuration.
Without this, browsers block requests even when the server sends correct
CORS headers.

This fixes the "No 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' header" error when
attempting Google OAuth login on production domain.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
